children.name: 1. Test Case ID: SUoOx6  - Authentication declared but not enforced for this operation      The API returned `204 No Content` for `GET /api/v1/health/live` with invalid auth.  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/live

1. Test Case ID: bZZeFc  - Authentication declared but not enforced for this operation      The API returned `204 No Content` for `GET /api/v1/health/started` with invalid auth.  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/started
